name: Royal Wax Atamfa — 6 Yards

description: Classic gold-and-crimson geometric atamfa, hand-selected for its high-contrast print and rich hand-feel.

name: Emerald Adinkra Atamfa — 6 Yards
description: Emerald-green atamfa featuring an adinkra-inspired repeat, popular for celebration wear.

name: Kente-Weave Cotton — per Yard
description: Hand-inspired kente-weave cotton, medium weight, ideal for tailored garments and accessories.

name: Bogolan Mudcloth — per Yard
description: Earth-toned bogolan-style mudcloth print on brushed cotton, great for structured pieces.

name: Aso-Oke Metallic Weave — per Yard
description: Lightweight aso-oke style weave with metallic gold threading, suited for occasion wear.

name: Men's Atamfa Kaftan

description: Two-piece kaba and slit in kente-weave cotton, tailored bodice, floor-length slit skirt.

name: Children's Ankara Party Dress
